title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers presents five production deployment patterns for AI agents: streaming tool call events for UI responsiveness, separated authentication layers using API Gateway and Cognito, type-safe database access with tenant isolation, guardrails and cost controls via lifecycle hooks and model routing, and observability through metrics and OpenTelemetry distributed tracing.
